title: Implement an irrigation-related environmental protection program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement an irrigation-related environmental protection program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Provide information to staff involved in irrigation and related work

pcs.text: Provide information on the irrigation and drainage environmental protection plan to staff and explain
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide information on the irrigation and drainage environmental protection plan to staff and explain?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide information on the irrigation and drainage environmental protection plan to staff and explain.

pcs.text: Explain relevant environmental protection legislation, regulation, codes of practice and workplace procedures and their application to staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain relevant environmental protection legislation, regulation, codes of practice and workplace procedures and their application to staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain relevant environmental protection legislation, regulation, codes of practice and workplace procedures and their application to staff.

pcs.text: Explain and demonstrate information about known risks to the environment and work practices associated with irrigation practices and related activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain and demonstrate information about known risks to the environment and work practices associated with irrigation practices and related activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain and demonstrate information about known risks to the environment and work practices associated with irrigation practices and related activities.

pcs.text: Explain and demonstrate workplace environmental record system and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain and demonstrate workplace environmental record system and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain and demonstrate workplace environmental record system and procedures.

pcs.text: Identify environmental protection induction and training needs and arrange training as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental protection induction and training needs and arrange training as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental protection induction and training needs and arrange training as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Provide information to staff involved in irrigation and related work

elements.title: Implement and monitor procedures for identifying risks to the environment and maintaining effective control measures

pcs.text: Identify and report environmental risks so that adequate risk assessment and control measures can be implemented
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report environmental risks so that adequate risk assessment and control measures can be implemented?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report environmental risks so that adequate risk assessment and control measures can be implemented.

pcs.text: Implement and monitor irrigation related environmental protection plan and program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement and monitor irrigation related environmental protection plan and program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement and monitor irrigation related environmental protection plan and program.

pcs.text: Identify and record inadequacies in existing risk control measures or allocation of resources according to environmental issue reporting procedures and processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record inadequacies in existing risk control measures or allocation of resources according to environmental issue reporting procedures and processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record inadequacies in existing risk control measures or allocation of resources according to environmental issue reporting procedures and processes.

pcs.text: Report environmental or resource allocation issues and measures to the owner or manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report environmental or resource allocation issues and measures to the owner or manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report environmental or resource allocation issues and measures to the owner or manager.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement and monitor procedures for identifying risks to the environment and maintaining effective control measures

elements.title: Implement procedures for responding to potential and actual environmental pollution events

pcs.text: Implement procedures for responding to potential and actual pollution events to ensure prompt and effective control action is taken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement procedures for responding to potential and actual pollution events to ensure prompt and effective control action is taken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement procedures for responding to potential and actual pollution events to ensure prompt and effective control action is taken.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and report pollution events?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and report pollution events.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate stormwater control requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate stormwater control requirements.

pcs.text: Discuss suitable measures to prevent recurrence and minimise risk of pollution events with the owner or manager, and implement revised procedures where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss suitable measures to prevent recurrence and minimise risk of pollution events with the owner or manager, and implement revised procedures where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss suitable measures to prevent recurrence and minimise risk of pollution events with the owner or manager, and implement revised procedures where necessary.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement procedures for responding to potential and actual environmental pollution events

elements.title: Implement and monitor procedures for maintaining environmental protection record

pcs.text: Identify and rectify gaps in record keeping systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and rectify gaps in record keeping systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and rectify gaps in record keeping systems.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain environmental protection records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain environmental protection records.

pcs.text: Monitor record keeping systems to ensure compliance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor record keeping systems to ensure compliance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor record keeping systems to ensure compliance.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Implement and monitor procedures for maintaining environmental protection record
